subject: Pale-skinned vampire noblewoman with long dark hair, wearing an ornate high-collared blood-red robe, conjuring a glowing red orb of magical energy in her raised hand
description: A regal female vampire stands in three-quarter view against a darkened, smoky backdrop. Her skin is corpse-pale, her long dark hair frames a sharp aristocratic face with a cold, focused expression. She wears an ornate floor-length gown in deep crimson with a high stiff collar that rises behind her head like a stylized cobra hood, the fabric trimmed with metallic detailing. Her right arm is raised, palm up, summoning a brilliant orb of red-orange magical fire that throws warm rim light across her face and chest. The background is murky with hints of architecture or ruins lost in shadow, lit only by the glow of her conjured magic and a faint reddish ambient haze, suggesting a private chamber or ritual space.
foreground: vampire noblewoman conjuring a glowing red orb of energy
background: shadowed indoor or ruin space lit only by the magical glow
emotion: cold, imperious, focused — quiet menace and aristocratic disdain
